name: tile-windows
title: Tile Windows
description: Distribute windows evenly across your screen — halves, thirds, or quarters
author: marekmensa

commands.name: arrange
commands.title: Arrange Ghostty
commands.description: Auto-detect Ghostty window count and tile accordingly (1=full, 2=halves, 3=thirds, 4+=quarters)

commands.name: halves
commands.title: Ghostty Halves
commands.description: Arrange two Ghostty windows side by side

commands.name: thirds
commands.title: Ghostty Thirds
commands.description: Arrange three Ghostty windows in equal columns

commands.name: quarters
commands.title: Ghostty Quarters
commands.description: Arrange four Ghostty windows in a 2x2 grid
